fixture.notes: AT&T Stadium/Dallas Stadium listing and match previews place England vs Croatia in Arlington at 15:00 local on 2026-06-17.

team_news: Jude Bellingham is expected to start at No. 10 for England.
Bukayo Saka's fitness is being monitored; Noni Madueke is an option if Saka cannot start.
Tino Livramento is out of the World Cup and Trevoh Chalobah has been called up.
Croatia's core remains Luka Modric, Mateo Kovacic, Ivan Perisic and Josko Gvardiol.
weather_venue: Dallas/Arlington forecast notes point to around 34C at kickoff, real feel near 41C, rain risk and 44% humidity.
AT&T Stadium has a retractable roof and air conditioning, reducing direct heat exposure if closed.
historical_structural: England have won six of the previous eleven meetings with Croatia.
Croatia beat England in the 2018 World Cup semi-final after extra time; England won the Euro 2020 meeting 1-0.
First match for both sides: England need a statement, Croatia can accept a point.
